treasury_accumulation.note: AF is buyback_wallet not treasury_wallet — already counted as buybacks

net_staking_lockups.note: Daily snapshots accumulate over time. Until ≥2 snapshots exist, delta=0 for historical days. Static stock figure surfaced in the report's reference section.

buybacks.note: ALL AAVE inflows to Collector — dominated by CoW-routed TokenLogic buybacks but may include non-buyback deposits

treasury_accumulation.note: Collector inflows already counted as buybacks; double-counting avoided

treasury_sells.note: Collector mostly accumulates; rare outflows uncategorized for now

buybacks.note: SBE / MCD_FLAP burns to 0x0. Currently zero (Phase 1 bypass). Will become non-zero when ABC fill threshold ($150M) is reached.

burns.note: For SKY, burns and buybacks are the same thing (SBE IS the burn engine); counted once under buybacks

treasury_accumulation.note: ABC fill — contract address still TBD via ChainLog. Will track when discovered.

net_staking_lockups.note: SKY.balanceOf(LockStakeEngine) daily Δ. ~10B SKY currently locked.

unlocks.note: Pre-cliff (Dec 22 2026) — no team unlocks. Tokenomics module pending.

buybacks.note: zkLighter L2 /api/v1/trades requires Lighter API key (acquisition #3 in DATA-SOURCES.md). Until obtained, buyback flow can't be ingested.

burns.note: Unknown — verify whether Lighter burns vs holds after API key obtained

treasury_accumulation.note: L2 protocol accounts not yet discovered

net_staking_lockups.note: LIT L2 staking contract not yet identified
